message:
test: expand E2E, snapshot, stress, and capability test coverage

demo-showcase tests:
- async_tasks_stress.rs: expand stress test scenarios (+48 lines)
- capability_sim_e2e.rs: improve capability simulation coverage (+16 lines)
- inspector_stress.rs: add additional inspector stress scenarios (+76 lines)
- macro_recorder_determinism.rs: add serial annotation
- screen_snapshots.rs: expand snapshot test coverage (+18 lines)
- terminal_capabilities_ux_a11y.rs: add UX/a11y test cases (+30 lines)
- terminal_e2e.rs: new full E2E terminal test suite (+106 lines)

extras tests:
- markdown_table_snapshots.rs: add 199 lines of table rendering snapshots
- text_effects_snapshots.rs: add 199 lines of text effects snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
